briefs.title: BC Liquor Licensing Rule Repealed: Section 29 of Regulation 241/2016 Removed
briefs.summary: BC has repealed (permanently removed) Section 29 of the Liquor Control and Licensing Regulation, effective December 8, 2025. Liquor licence holders should check whether this section applied to their business.
briefs.action_required: Review your liquor licence conditions to confirm whether repealed Section 29 affected your operations.
